subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thy letter was received. Thou hast written that the publication of the book of Mirza Abul Fazl (The Bahá'í Proofs) is commenced
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @review of publications, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
